title: 6 Pieces Of Yellow Utility Knives, Simple And Portable Work Knives, Package Openers, Cardboard Cutters.
features: [Product Content] You Will Receive 6 Yellow Utility Knives.Each Utility Knife Has A Size Of 17*2.6Cm And A Color Of Yellow, Which Is Suitable For Various Cutting Tasks, Such As Package Unpacking And Cardboard Cutting.

[Product Material] This Utility Knife Is Made Of Plastic Material, The Blade Is Lightweight And Sturdy, Comfortable To Use, And Not Easy To Slip Off.The Plastic Material Not Only Reduces The Weight Of The Tool, But Also Ensures Its Durability And Stability For Long-Term Use.

[Simple Design] This Utility Knife Has A Simple And Practical Design, Easy To Use, And Is Suitable For A Variety Of Daily Cutting Needs.The Lightweight Design Makes It Easy To Carry And Store, And It Is Very Suitable For Home, Office And Outdoor Use.

[Widely Used] This Utility Knife Is Very Suitable For Packaging, Unpacking, Cutting Cardboard And Various Other Cutting Tasks.Whether At Home Or In The Workplace, It Can Provide You With Convenience And Is An Essential Practical Tool For Every Toolbox.

[Easy To Maintain] This Utility Knife Is Easy To Clean And Maintain After Use, And The Plastic Material Is Not Easy To Stain With Dirt. After The Tool Is Used, It Only Needs To Be Wiped To Keep It Clean And Extend Its Service Life.
